set_fields.close_reason: Done: ExecutionProfile is now a concrete model/thinking/policy contract with no selector.mode or promptProfile.mode; Ralph/autoresearch loop state decode rejects stale mode-shaped execution profiles; capture/apply uses current model/thinking without resolving a mode preset; agent spawn and worker execution profiles use concrete fields. Verified with cd extensions/tau && npm run gate (98 files, 656 tests; lint warnings pre-existing).
